## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why does it matter?
     "I want X" is less useful than "I can't do Y because Z". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific about behaviour, not just goals. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about? Why are they worse? -->

## Affected area

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Service (bot logic, scheduler, AI client, X API)
- [ ] Dashboard (UI, config, logs, posts view)
- [ ] News fetching / source management
- [ ] Documentation
